name: Tungsten Mining Nl
analysis: Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at A$0.2211. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$0.2211, stop A$0.1881, target A$0.2300. Risk/reward is 0.27:1.
